seo.title: Hotel Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your hotel. Route unhappy guests to private feedback before it hits Google. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Hotels
hero.subheading: Guests check out fast. ReviewFlo helps you follow up after their stay before they move on.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Hotel Faces

items.heading: Quiet stays don’t always become reviews
items.body: If nothing went wrong, guests may never think to post.

items.heading: One bad night can dominate your profile
items.body: Noise, billing, or room issues can show up online first.

items.heading: Front desk shifts are too busy to ask
items.body: Staff are handling the next guest, not chasing stars.

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after checkout
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link when the guest leaves or checks out.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they message you instead of posting publicly.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star guests go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Fits checkout and email receipts
items.body: Send the link right after the stay ends.

items.heading: Private feedback first
items.body: You can address issues before they become public reviews.

items.heading: Works for one property or many
items.body: Use separate links per location if needed.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.a: Yes, when you ask right after checkout while the stay is fresh.

items.q: What if a guest is unhappy?
items.a: They rate 1–4 stars and send you a private message instead of going to Google.
No. It’s a link by text or email.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same core flow for review requests and private feedback. ReviewFlo is priced for small teams.

items.q: Can we use this for boutique properties?
items.a: Yes. Same follow-up flow for any size property.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Hotel Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first request goes out in under 5 minutes.
